user.title: Connect to Maytag / Whirlpool
user.description: Enter your Maytag app credentials and the SAID(s) for your appliances. You can find the SAID in the Maytag app under appliance details. Separate multiple SAIDs with commas.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Maytag / Whirlpool
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are no longer valid. Please re-enter them.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Maytag / Whirlpool
reconfigure.description: Update your credentials or appliance SAIDs.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Whirlpool API. Check your network connection.
error.no_saids: Please enter at least one dryer or washer SAID.

abort.already_configured: This Maytag account is already configured.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The email address does not match the original account.
